---
title: "Publicações"
description-meta: "Informações, pdfs, e métricas dos trabalhos"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  - id: peer-reviewed
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Peer-reviewed Journal Paper"
  
  - id: conference
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Conference Paper"
css: pub-listing.css
filters: [remove-stray-divfence.lua]  
---

## Artigos de revista

::: {#peer-reviewed}

:::

## Artigos de Congressos

::: {#conference}

:::


{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}

<script>
// Reorder category filter: All -> Journal -> Conference -> years (desc)
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-listing-category').forEach(function(container) {
    var cats = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('.category'));
    if (!cats.length) return;
    cats.sort(function(a, b) {
      var ta = a.textContent.trim(), tb = b.textContent.trim();
      var aIsAll = ta.startsWith('All'), bIsAll = tb.startsWith('All');
      if (aIsAll) return -1; if (bIsAll) return 1;
      var aIsJournal = ta.startsWith('Journal'), bIsJournal = tb.startsWith('Journal');
      if (aIsJournal && !bIsAll) return -1; if (bIsJournal && !aIsAll) return 1;
      var aIsConf = ta.startsWith('Conference'), bIsConf = tb.startsWith('Conference');
      if (aIsConf && !bIsAll && !bIsJournal) return -1;
      if (bIsConf && !aIsAll && !aIsJournal) return 1;
      // Years: descending numeric
      var na = parseInt(ta), nb = parseInt(tb);
      if (!isNaN(na) && !isNaN(nb)) return nb - na;
      return ta.localeCompare(tb);
    });
    cats.forEach(function(c) { container.appendChild(c); });
  });
});
</script>
